sutta: this is another important suta buddha said monks although a wish such as this may arise in the heart of a monk as he lives without applying himself to making become or that my heart might be freed of the asavas and be without attachment yet his heart is not so free and what is the reason let it be said it is lack of making become making what become the 4 in 10 states of mindfulness sati patana the 4 right efforts the 4 basis of success or sometimes the phobias is translated as the 4 basis of psychic power eddie pada the 5 faculties india the 5 powers bala the 7 factors of enlightenment and the aryan eightfold path i just stopped here to commend is making become actually is the pali word is making become or development and here the buddha is saying that if a person does not make become or develop these 37 things he cannot attain destruction of the asavas these 37 things are called the 37 bodhi pakiya dharmas generally translated as the requisites of enlightenment and here it is quite clear all 37 bodhi pakiya dhammas are necessary for the destruction of the asafas is not just the 4 sati patana for sati patana is just 4 things are out of this 37 then you need the 4 right efforts the 4 basis of basis of success the ed pa does the 5 faculties the 5 powers the 7 factors of enlightenment and the aryan eightfold path now there's a suta in the majima nikaya 149 where it's stated that when the iron eightfold path is fully developed all the 37 bodhi pakiya dhammas are fully developed at the same time and samata and the passana tranquilization and contemplation are led to work together so you see when the the path to enlightenment taught by the buddha is basically the aryan eightfold path but when you cultivate develop fully the aryan eightfold path and all the 37 bodhi pakiya are automatically cultivated now the buddha continues monks it is just as if it is just as if a hand sitting on 8 or 10 or a dozen eggs and if the eggs were not fully set upon not fully warm not fully made to become and although such a wish as this might come to that hand or that my chicks chicks might break the egg shells with the spike claws of their feet or with their beaks and bills and hatch out safely yet it is not possible for those chicks to break the shells with their claws and beaks and to hatch out safely and what is the reason it is because monks those hands eggs have not been fully set on nor fully warmed nor fully made to become in just the same way monks although a wish such as this might arise in the heart of a monk as he lives without applying himself to make him become or that my heart might be freed of the asavas and be without attachment yet his heart is not so free and what is the reason that it be said it is lack of making become making what become the 4 in 10 states of mindfulness the 4 right efforts the 4 basis of success etc etc monks although such a wish as this might not arise in the heart of a monk as he leaves applying himself to making become yet his heart is freed from the asavas and attachment and why let it be said it is due to making become making what become the 4 in 10 states of mindfulness the 4 uh right efforts the 4 basis of psychic power the 5 faculties etc etc it is just as if 8 or 10 or a dozen hens eggs were fully set upon fully warmed and fully made to become although any such wish might not come to the hand yet those chicks would hatch out safely and why because the eggs were fully made were fully warmed fully set upon fully made to become in just the same way monks although a man might not express such a wish his heart would be freed from the earth of us and from attachment because of his making become the 4 intense states of mindfulness the full right efforts the 4 basis of success etc etc monks this has a carpenter or a carpenter's apprentice inspecting the handle of his ads sees there on the marks of his fingers and thumb but knows not how much of the abs handle was worn away that day nor the previous day nor at any time yet knows just when the wearing away has reached the end of wearing away even so monks among intent upon making become knows not to 1 extent the asavas were worn away that day not the previous day nor at any time yet knows just when the wearing away has reached the end of wearing away monks just as in an ocean-going ship rigged with mars and stays after it has sailed the seas for 6 months and is beach on the shore for the winter the stay is affected by wind and heat rain upon the rainy season easily weakened and rot away even so monks in among abiding intent upon making become the fattest easily weakened and wrought away that's the end of the suta
commentary:
this is a very good and important suta where it says that if a monk cultivates the 37 bodhi pakiya dharmas and then even if he does not wish to become enlightened he will automatically become enlightened but if he does not cultivate the 37 bodies even if he made a wish to become enlightened he who cannot become enlightened and the last partner is the interesting variable of the carpenters ads you know the carpenter's ads is for cleaning the wood and in our days now present days uh the ads you have to hold it with 2 hands to clean the wood but during the buddha's time they probably held it with 1 hand and play in the wood and because of the carpenter using the ads day after day the finger marks are impressed on the wooden the the marks can be seen on the wood but the buddha says that the computer does not know how much of the wood was worn away at any time today yesterday or any time so in the same way when we practice the holy life we do not know how much of the developments have been worn away this probably implies that a monk cannot be sure whether he has attained what stage of aryah would but at the end when he has completed all his work and he become an arahant then he knows just in the same way the buddha says the marks on the edge he does not know how much has been worn away but finally when the finger guns are impressed on the wood and then he knows that the wood has been worn away so this is a very important simile which tells us that the holy life only in the when we have completed the work then we know that the work is completed so some people they think they go for a short retreat and they want to destroy somehow so much so much of the assault as so much of the factors but it's it's not for sure that you know according to this parable it's only when you are arahant then you know so i'll stop here and
